islands.name: Coincraft Cove
islands.description: A friendly seaside village where young explorers learn to count, save, and spend coins wisely.

learning_objectives: Identify coins and bills by value
Understand the difference between needs and wants
Learn that saving now lets you buy bigger things later
provenance.originality_notes: Theme: seaside craft village with artisan shops (not a bank or store sim). Verb: sort coins into craft-supply purchases and dialogue-driven saving decisions (not roll-and-collect). Structure: cooperative quest chain helping NPC villagers solve problems (not competitive accumulation). Blends sorting puzzles with NPC mentorship scenarios unique to this project.

areas.name: Coin Harbor
areas.description: Boats bob in the sparkling water. A cheerful dockworker sorts crates of supplies.

areas.name: Craft Market
areas.description: Colorful stalls sell paints, shells, and driftwood. Everything has a price tag!

areas.name: Savings Lighthouse
areas.description: A tall lighthouse with a glowing coin jar at the top. The keeper tracks how much the village has saved.

items.name: Coin Pouch
items.description: A small pouch that jingles with your first earnings.

items.name: Savings Jar
items.description: A glass jar that shows how your coins pile up over time.

items.name: Coincraft Badge
items.description: Proof you understand the basics of earning, spending, and saving!

description.explorer: Meet Captain Penny, get your Coin Pouch, and sort coins!
description.apprentice: Meet Captain Penny at the harbor, earn your Coin Pouch, and learn to count different denominations.
description.strategist: Master denomination math at the harbor — earn your pouch and prove exact-change proficiency.

hint.explorer: Talk to Captain Penny at the harbor. She loves helping new sailors!
hint.apprentice: Start at Coin Harbor and talk to Captain Penny. She'll teach you about coins!
hint.strategist: Harbor first: Captain Penny, then the Coin Sort minigame — aim for a high score.

quests.title: Save or Spend?
quests.description: Help Artisan Alma sort her supplies into needs and wants, then visit Keeper Kira to start saving.
quests.hint: Visit the Craft Market and talk to Alma, then head to the Savings Lighthouse.

text.explorer: Ahoy, little explorer! See these shiny coins? One is worth more than the other. Want to learn which?
text.apprentice: Ahoy, young explorer! Ever counted real coins before? I've got a pouch here with your name on it — but first, can you tell me which coin is worth more?
text.strategist: Ahoy. Before you handle a float, you need denomination fluency — penny, nickel, dime, quarter. Ready for a quick audit?
I'll review on my own first.

text.explorer: A penny is 1 cent, a nickel is 5, a dime is 10, and a quarter is 25. Grab your Coin Pouch and try sorting!
text.apprentice: Great spirit! A penny is 1 cent, a nickel is 5, a dime is 10, and a quarter is 25. Grab that Coin Pouch on the dock and try sorting some coins!
text.strategist: Penny 1¢, nickel 5¢, dime 10¢, quarter 25¢. Exact change avoids overpaying — collect your pouch and run the sort challenge.

nodes.speaker: Captain Penny
nodes.text: No rush, sailor. The harbor's not going anywhere!

nodes.speaker: Artisan Alma
nodes.text: Oh, you have a Coin Pouch! I need help sorting my supplies. Some things I NEED for my art, and some things I just WANT. Can you help?

nodes.speaker: Artisan Alma
nodes.text: Needs are things you can't do without — like paintbrushes for an artist. Wants are nice extras — like glitter. If you spend all your coins on wants, you might not have enough for needs!

nodes.speaker: Artisan Alma
nodes.text: No problem! Come back when you're ready to sort.

nodes.speaker: Keeper Kira
nodes.text: Welcome to the Savings Lighthouse! Every coin you put in the jar today means more to spend tomorrow. Want to start saving?

choices.text: Yes! Show me how saving works.

nodes.speaker: Keeper Kira
nodes.text: Here's your Savings Jar! Every time you earn coins, try putting some in here instead of spending them all. You'll be amazed how fast they grow!

nodes.speaker: Keeper Kira
nodes.text: The lighthouse will be here when you're ready!

nodes.speaker: Shelly
nodes.text: Pretty shells! Only 5 coins each. But ask yourself — do you NEED a shell, or do you just WANT one? That's the secret to smart spending!

choices.text: That's a want, not a need!

nodes.speaker: Shelly
nodes.text: You got it! Wants are okay sometimes, but needs come first. Smart thinking!

nodes.speaker: Shelly
nodes.text: Taking time to think before buying — that's already a great money habit!

minigames.name: Coin Sort Challenge
minigames.description: Earn coins from odd jobs, then make exact change to buy craft supplies.

minigames.name: Coin Catcher Arcade
minigames.description: Retro arcade action! Catch falling coins and dodge impulse buys.

minigames.name: Treasure Vault Explorer
minigames.description: Explore rooms, collect coins, and solve needs-vs-wants puzzles to unlock the vault.

minigames.name: Island News & Surprises
minigames.description: The island economy brings unexpected events — navigate news shocks, surprise expenses, and lucky windfalls!

minigames.name: Compound Snowball
minigames.description: Roll your savings down the hill! Reinvest each year and watch your coins grow faster and faster.
